pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly expect these two sheets.
Task description and verifier.py expect exactly these five segments. The actual real data contains a 6th ('Complementary'), but instructions explicitly mandate restricting the summary to these five.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real TidyTuesday Hotel Booking Demand dataset by default (with a synthetic data fallback). The 'expected_sheets' metadata correctly maps to the required 'Bookings' and 'Segment_Analysis' sheets. The 'expected_segments' metadata accurately matches the five market segments explicitly requested in the task description, even though the underlying real data also contains a minor 6th segment ('Complementary').
